yaml.title: Junpei Suzuki PhD
yaml.subtitle: Junior Associate Professor of Political Science, Komazawa University

markdown.markdown:
[[Open the full CV here]{.badge .bg-primary}](cv.pdf)

[[日本語の履歴書はこちら]{.badge .bg-primary}](https://researchmap.jp/junpeisuzuki-ps)

### Basic Information

 - Name: Junpei SUZUKI
     - Pronounced as *JUNE-PAY*
     - Written as 鈴木淳平 (すずき・じゅんぺい) in Japanese
 - Citizenship: Japan
 - Pronouns: he/his/him
 - Language: Japanese (native), British English (business-level)
 - Email: jsuzuki[at]komazawa-u[dot]ac[dot]jp
 - Position: Junior Associate Professor
    - *kōshi* (講師) in Japanese;
    - equivalent to a tenured assistant professor in North America or a lecturer in the Commonwealth system.
 - Affiliation: Department of Political Science, Faculty of Law, Komazawa University
 - Address: 1-23-1 Komazawa, Setagaya-ku, Tokyo-to, 154-8525, Japan
    - Please specify 'Department of Political Science, Faculty of Law' not to be confused with Prof. Junpei Suzuki at Arts & Sciences.
